member.name: T:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppearanceType

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppearanceType.Tab
member.summary: The IAppControl appears as a tab.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppearanceType.Floating
member.summary: The IAppControl appears as a non-modal window.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppearanceType.Modal

member.name: T:Comos.Global.AppControls.Area
member.summary: Specifies in which area of the user interface an IAppControl is placed.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.Area.Undefined
member.summary: The area is not defined.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.Area.Document
member.summary: The IAppControl is placed in the main document area.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.Area.Document2
member.summary: The IAppControl is placed in the document area of the second screen. If the second screen is not enabled, the IAppControl is placed in the main document area.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.Area.Navigator
member.summary: The IAppControl is placed in the navigator area.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.Area.SidePanel
member.summary: Specifies that the element is positioned in the side panel area of the user interface.

member.name: T:Comos.Global.AppControls.SubArea
member.summary: Specifies in which subarea of the user interface an IAppControl is placed. This option is only applied if the IAppControl represents a tab in the navigator area.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.SubArea.Undefined
member.summary: The subarea is not defined.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.SubArea.Default
member.summary: The IAppControl is placed in the main area of the navigator.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.SubArea.Detail
member.summary: The IAppControl is placed in the detail area of the navigator.

member.name: T:Comos.Global.AppControls.ScaleMode
member.summary: Specifies the scale mode of an IAppControl.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.ScaleMode.Undefined
member.summary: The scale mode is not defined.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.ScaleMode.Pixel
member.summary: The width and the height of an IAppControl are set in pixels.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.ScaleMode.Twip
member.summary: The width and the height of an IAppControl are set in twips.

member.name: T:Comos.Global.AppControls.ResizeMode

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.ResizeMode.Resize
member.summary: The IAppControl can resize.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.ResizeMode.NoResize
member.summary: The IAppControl cannot resize.

member.name: T:Comos.Global.AppControls.AutoClose
member.summary: Specifies whether an IAppControl is automatically closed if a project or working overlay change occurs.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AutoClose.Undefined
member.summary: The auto close behaviour is not defined.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AutoClose.AutoClose
member.summary: The IAppControl is automatically closed if a project or working overlay change occurs.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AutoClose.NoAutoClose

member.name: T:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppControlState
member.summary: Specifies the state of an IAppControl.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppControlState.Undefined
member.summary: The state is not defined.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppControlState.ReuseOnly
member.summary: The IAppControl is reused if the same kind of IAppControl is opened again. The user cannot change this state.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppControlState.Reuse
member.summary: The IAppControl is reused if the same kind of IAppControl is opened again. The user can change this state.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppControlState.UniqueOnly
member.summary: The IAppControl is not reused if the same kind of IAppControl is opened again. The user cannot change this state.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppControlState.Unique
member.summary: The IAppControl is not reused if the same kind of IAppControl is opened again. The user can change this state.

member.name: F:Comos.Global.AppControls.AppControlState.NoState
member.summary: In this case no state will be visible. WindowMenuExtension(green round button) will be collapsed.

member.param: An IAppControlOptions instance which specifies the options for the new IAppControl. This IAppControlOptions instance must have been created with the CreateOptions method and must not be reused for creating further IAppControl instances.

member.returns: True if the IAppControl was closed. Otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Comos.Global.CExtensions.ExtensionMethods.AsEnumerable(Plt.IComosDCollection)
member.summary: Returns an IEnumerable<IComosBaseObject> for the collection.
member.param: The collection to get an IEnumerable<IComosBaseObject> for.
member.returns: An IEnumerable<IComosBaseObject> for the collection.
member.remarks: This method is implemented by using deferred execution. The immediate return value is an object that stores all the information that is required to perform the action. The query represented by this method is not executed until the object is enumerated either by calling its GetEnumerator method directly or by using foreach.

member.name: T:Comos.Global.CompatibleIDispatch
member.summary: As IDispatchImplType.CompatibleImpl attribute is deprecated, we introduce an IReflect implementation to be able to call our C# class members late bound, especially from VBScript, where we observed difficulties, e. g. when omitting optional parameters or dealing with methods which accept strongly typed objects. The interesting part is "InvokeMember".

member.name: T:Comos.Global.Markup.ConverterPipe
member.summary: A value converter which contains a list of IValueConverters and invokes their Convert or ConvertBack methods in the order that they exist in the list. The output of one converter is piped into the next converter allowing for modular value converters to be chained together. If the ConvertBack method is invoked, the value converters are executed in reverse order (highest to lowest index). Do not leave an element in the Converters property collection null, every element must reference a valid IValueConverter instance. If a value converter's type is not decorated with the ValueConversionAttribute, an InvalidOperationException will be thrown when the converter is added to the Converters collection.

member.name: P:Comos.Global.Markup.ConverterPipe.Converters
member.summary: Returns the list of IValueConverters contained in this converter.

member.name: M:Comos.Global.Markup.ConverterPipe.#ctor
member.summary: Create an instance of class

member.name: M:Comos.Global.Markup.ConverterPipe.GetTargetType(System.Int32,System.Type,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the target type for a conversion operation.
member.param: The index of the current converter about to be executed.
The 'targetType' argument passed into the conversion method.
Pass true if calling from the Convert method, or false if calling from ConvertBack.

member.name: M:Comos.Global.Markup.ConverterPipe.Convert(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Call 'Convert'-method of all converters of the collection in the order they were added. If one converter of the collection returns Binding.DoNothing the convertion is terminated.

member.name: M:Comos.Global.Markup.ConverterPipe.ConvertBack(System.Object,System.Type,System.Object,System.Globalization.CultureInfo)
member.summary: Call 'ConvertBack'-method of all converters of the collection in the reverse order they were added. If one converter of the collection returns Binding.DoNothing the convertion is terminated.
